questions.context_sentence: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside
questions.cn: 狂风咆哮，就像内心这狂卷的暴风雨
questions.hint: 联想记忆：h(看作椅子)+owl(猫头鹰) -> 坐在椅子上听猫头鹰咆哮。

v. 狂暴；肆虐 n. 盛怒

questions.meaning: v. 狂暴；肆虐 n. 盛怒

options: v. 狂暴；肆虐 n. 盛怒

questions.context_sentence: It's funny how some distance makes everything seem small
questions.cn: 真可笑，一些距离让一切看起来都变小了

questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Years later, during her coronation ceremony to become Queen of Arendelle, her emotions get out of control.
questions.cn: 数年后，在加冕为阿伦黛尔女王的仪式上，她的情绪失控了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：corona(王冠)+tion(名词后缀) -> 戴上王冠 of the coronation ceremony.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择英文单词 "coronation" 的正确中文释义

questions.context_sentence: And one thought crystallizes like an icy blast
